title: melanthera amellus
intro: Melanthera amellus, also known as the Bastard Toadflax or Small Toadflax, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, offering benefits like reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, Melanthera amellus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
